text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, the wind feels great! I could train here for
hours!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've come here for the occasional change of
pace. Seeing Haru Urara running and jumping
about with excitement, I'm reassured that this was
the right idea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she proclaimed, she's already training away
under the clear blue sky.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Look, a squirrel!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Despite several such lapses of concentration,
she thankfully stays on track and completes her
morning training routine.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ack!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
What do I do?! I forgot to bring lunch! The meat,
the veggies—everything!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
We're training outdoors today?! Then let's have a
barbecue for lunch!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Leave the meat and veggies to me! And, Trainer,
you bring the tools!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! This'll be so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We stare in gloomy silence at the lonely barbecue
set plopped down by the creek.
choice_data_list: Guess we've got no choice but to head b—

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Let's go fishing!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I saw some in the stream earlier! Wait for me, I'll
catch some!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without waiting for a reply, Haru Urara dips her
feet into the currents. Worried that she might
slip, I quickly follow after her.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! The fishies are so fast!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! You can't outrun me! Wait up!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Haaah! Did you see that?! I couldn't catch them at
all!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: The fishies were so fast, like, whiz and whoosh! I wanna be as fast as them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite Haru Urara's best efforts, the fish keep
evading her grasp. I note that she must be tired
and suggest that I take over, but...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm not tired at all! Don't worry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She... doesn't look like she's forcing a smile. In
fact, her expression looks even brighter than
when we started.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: It's more fun when there's a challenge!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Did you notice? I'm catching up to the fishies,
little by little!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Just now, I slightly touched one... My heartbeat
went crazy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad it's not easy. Or else the fun would be
over too quickly.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: All right! I'm gonna try again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...That's right. She's always been like this. It's not
that I've forgotten, but to experience it in person
again...
choice_data_list: Don't rush it. Let's observe carefully!
Don't rush it. Let's observe carefully!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, I did it! I caught one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She turns to me, sporting a smile you can't help
but want to cheer on and on.
